What We Source

Ingredient Categories

Six category families. Hundreds of individual ingredients. Every one sourced from GMP-certified, audit-ready Indian producers — and matched to the specific market requirements of your region.

Category 01
5,000 years of tradition

Ayurvedic Ingredients

The foundational botanicals of Ayurveda — India's classical system of medicine. These are the adaptogens, rasayanas, and tonic herbs that global supplement brands, functional food producers, and wellness formulators are building their most credible product lines around.

  • GMP certified
  • FSSAI licensed
  • Organic (NPOP/NOP)
  • Standardised extracts available

Ashwagandha

Withania somnifera

Root extract (KSM-66, Sensoril standardised), root powder. The world's most commercially significant Ayurvedic adaptogen.

Shatavari

Asparagus racemosus

Root powder and extract. A leading women's wellness tonic — growing demand across EU nutraceutical and functional food sectors.

Brahmi

Bacopa monnieri

Aerial extract standardised to bacosides. A nootropic ingredient in strong demand from UK, USA, Japan and Korean cognitive supplement markets.

Category 02
Precision standardisation

Herbal Extracts

Concentrated botanical extracts with defined active content — standardised by HPLC, UV, or gravimetric methods. Supplied as dry powders, liquid extracts, or encapsulated forms. Each batch accompanied by full CoA, MSDS, and origin documentation.

  • HPLC-standardised actives
  • ISO 22000 / ISO 9001
  • Halal & Kosher available
  • EU, UK, US import-ready

Tulsi Extract

Ocimum tenuiflorum

Leaf extract standardised to ursolic acid and eugenol. Adaptogenic, antimicrobial — highly sought by functional tea and supplement brands in ANZ, USA and UK.

Boswellia Extract

Boswellia serrata

AKBA-standardised Indian frankincense extract. The leading joint health ingredient in European and North American nutraceutical markets.

Guduchi Extract

Tinospora cordifolia

Stem extract standardised to tinosporin. A premier Ayurvedic immunomodulator with growing clinical validation and rising demand across EU and Korean markets.

Category 03
Whole ingredient integrity

Botanical Powders

Whole-plant and single-part botanical powders — dried, milled, and sieved to specification. Used in finished supplements, functional foods, teas, smoothie blends, and cosmetic formulations. Available in conventional, organic, and spray-dried formats.

  • Organic NPOP / NOP certified
  • Mesh size to specification
  • Heavy metal tested
  • Pesticide residue screened

Moringa Powder

Moringa oleifera

Leaf powder — a complete protein source with exceptional iron and antioxidant profiles. In high demand from EU health food brands, SEA wellness markets, and LatAm functional food producers.

Amla Powder

Phyllanthus emblica

Indian gooseberry fruit powder — one of the richest natural sources of Vitamin C. A star ingredient for immunity, hair wellness, and antioxidant supplement formulations worldwide.

Neem Powder

Azadirachta indica

Leaf and seed powder. Widely used in cosmetic formulations, nutraceutical capsules, and functional wellness products across EU, UK and Middle East markets.

Category 04
Active ingredient science

Nutraceutical Ingredients

Active botanical ingredients for inclusion in dietary supplements, functional foods, and nutraceutical formulations. Supplied with full technical documentation — CoA, MSDS, stability data, and bioavailability references — to meet the procurement standards of regulated markets globally.

  • GMP, ISO 22000
  • EU Novel Food status guidance
  • FDA facility registered
  • Full technical dossier available

Curcumin (Turmeric Extract)

Curcuma longa

95% curcuminoids standardised, BCM-95 and CurcuWIN formats available. The world's most studied botanical anti-inflammatory — core to supplement lines in every major global market.

Piperine (Black Pepper Extract)

Piper nigrum

95% piperine standardised. The bioavailability enhancer found in the majority of premium curcumin, ashwagandha, and fat-soluble vitamin formulations globally.

Triphala

Amla, Haritaki, Bibhitaki

The foundational Ayurvedic three-fruit formula — standardised extract and traditional powder. In strong demand from digestive wellness and longevity supplement markets in USA, EU and Japan.

Category 05
Steam-distilled, cold-pressed, CO₂ extracted

Essential Oils

India is one of the world's most important origins for essential oil production — from steam-distilled spice oils in Kerala to CO₂-extracted botanical oils from Rajasthan and Uttarakhand. Supplied in full GC/MS-tested batches with complete quality documentation.

  • GC/MS tested, batch certified
  • IFRA compliance guidance
  • Food grade and cosmetic grade
  • Halal certified available

Cardamom Oil

Elettaria cardamomum

Steam-distilled from Kerala green cardamom pods. Prized in luxury fragrance, food flavouring, and aromatherapy applications from Europe to Japan.

Vetiver Oil

Chrysopogon zizanioides

Indian vetiver (khus) — steam-distilled root oil with a distinctive earthy, woody profile. A key base note in luxury fragrances and a growing ingredient in ayurvedic skincare formulations.

Ginger Oil

Zingiber officinale

CO₂ and steam-distilled from Indian ginger rhizomes. Used in food flavouring, digestive wellness formulations, and sports recovery products across all major global markets.

Category 06
Flowers, roots & botanicals

Natural Wellness Ingredients

Edible botanicals, functional flowers, and wellness-grade plant ingredients used in herbal teas, functional beverages, beauty supplements, and natural cosmetic formulations. From Himalayan rose petals to South Indian hibiscus — sourced at origin, processed to specification.

  • Food-grade processing
  • Organic NPOP certified
  • GMP handling and storage
  • Functional beverage grade

Rose Petals

Rosa damascena

Dried and whole rose petals from Rajasthan and Uttarakhand — used in luxury herbal teas, Ayurvedic skincare, and beauty supplement formulations across EU, UAE/GCC and Korean markets.

Hibiscus

Hibiscus sabdariffa

Dried calyx — a vibrant functional botanical used in herbal teas, functional beverages, and wellness formulations. Strong demand from EU, USA, and LatAm markets for its colour, flavour, and antioxidant content.

Chamomile

Matricaria chamomilla

Dried chamomile flowers — whole and cut grades available. A consistent top-seller in herbal tea blends globally, from UK high-street brands to Japanese wellness subscription boxes.

Every ingredient comes fully documented

We know that documentation is the difference between a sample that converts and one that stalls in your procurement process. Every ingredient we supply comes with a complete documentation package — matched to your market's specific import requirements.

CoA Certificate of Analysis
MSDS Safety Data Sheet
Phyto Phytosanitary Certificate
GMP GMP Certification
Org Organic Certificate (NPOP/NOP)
Halal Halal / Kosher Certification

Don't see what you're looking for?

Our sourcing capability extends well beyond this list. If you need a specific Indian botanical ingredient — in a particular form, grade, or certification — start a conversation and we'll tell you what we can do.

Intelligence. Connection. Growth.

Bridging India's finest wellness producers with international buyers. Verified ingredients. Transparent sourcing. Trusted relationships.
